Off Calendar Oct-21-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT SOMERSET/VACAVILLE ASSOCIATION LP, incorrectly sued herein as SOMERSET & VACAVILLE ASSOCIATES Motion For Change Venue (to Contra Costa County Superior Court, Unlimited Jurisdiction):
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED CCP SECTION 395(a). TRANSFERRED TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY. TRANSFER FEES TO BE PAID BY PLAINTIFF. DEFT AS PREVAILING PARTY, TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. (301/JLW/AC) Court Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
